phoneticUs: 藢sterio蕣藞kem瑟stri; 藢 st瑟rio蕣藞kem瑟stri
examples: Part I is concluded by a detailed chapter on stereochemistry.
The important role of stereochemistry of cyclic systems in organic Chemistry has been well established.
Many chiral drugs may differ in their pharmacological activities due to the difference of stereochemistry.
They have shapes, they have functional groups, they have stereochemistry and localized charges and conformations.
